mapper.sql: id, agent_id, target_id, target_type, verification_code, challenge_text, answer, attempt_count, max_attempts, expires_at, status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verification_challenges (agent_id, target_id, target_type, verification_code, challenge_text, answer, attempt_count, max_attempts, expires_at, status) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{verificationCode}, #{challengeText}, #{answer}, #{attemptCount}, #{maxAttempts}, #{expiresAt}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE verification_challenges SET agent_id = #{agentId}, target_id = #{targetId}, target_type = #{targetType}, verification_code = #{verificationCode}, challenge_text = #{challengeText}, answer = #{answer}, attempt_count = #{attemptCount}, max_attempts = #{maxAttempts}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM verification_challenges WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM verification_challenges WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM verification_challenges WHERE expires_at < NOW() AND status = 'pending' ORDER BY expires_at ASC
